use_cases: Primary call-to-action button for forms and interactive UI elements
Brand-consistent action triggers with loading state support for async operations
Icon-enhanced buttons for clear visual context and user guidance
Multi-variant button system supporting brand, neutral, and destructive actions
Responsive button component with hover, focus, and disabled states
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component featuring multiple variants (brand, neutral, destructive) and sizes (small, medium, large). Supports optional left/right icons and loading states. Built with Tailwind CSS, offering clean flat styling with proper hover, active, focus, and disabled states for accessibility. Suitable for SaaS applications requiring consistent, accessible action triggers across desktop and mobile platforms.
